sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE, inet_value INET);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, inet_value) VALUES (1, DATE '2020-01-01', inet '192.168.1.1');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, inet_value) VALUES (2, DATE '2020-12-31', inet '192.168.1.1');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, inet_value) VALUES (3, DATE '2020-06-15', inet '192.168.1.2');
SELECT usweekofyear(event_date) AS week, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY usweekofyear(event_date) HAVING COUNT(*) <> 0;
SELECT id, usweekofyear(event_date) AS week FROM test_dates WHERE event_date <> (SELECT MAX(event_date) FROM test_dates);
CREATE TABLE test_thresholds (threshold_id INT PRIMARY KEY, threshold_date DATE NOT NULL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_thresholds (threshold_id, threshold_date, description) VALUES (1, DATE '2020-01-01', 'Start of Year');
INSERT INTO test_thresholds (threshold_id, threshold_date, description) VALUES (2, DATE '2020-07-01', 'Mid Year');
INSERT INTO test_thresholds (threshold_id, threshold_date, description) VALUES (3, NULL, 'Null Date Entry');

SELECT t.threshold_id, usweekofyear(t.threshold_date) AS week, 'Threshold Active' AS status FROM test_thresholds t WHERE t.threshold_date IS NOT NULL AND t.threshold_date <> (SELECT MIN(threshold_date) FROM test_thresholds);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates d JOIN test_thresholds t ON usweekofyear(d.event_date) <> usweekofyear(t.threshold_date) WHERE d.inet_value <> inet '192.168.1.1';

SELECT id, usweekofyear(event_date) AS week FROM test_dates WHERE (event_date IS NULL OR inet_value <> inet '192.168.1.3') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_thresholds WHERE threshold_date IS NOT NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT usweekofyear(COALESCE(NULLIF(event_date, DATE '2020-12-31'), DATE '2020-01-01')) AS corrected_week FROM test_dates ORDER BY corrected_week;
SELECT d.id, usweekofyear(d.event_date) AS week FROM test_dates d WHERE d.inet_value IN (SELECT inet_value FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL) AND d.event_date <> DATE '2021-01-01';
CREATE TABLE test_composite (composite_id INT PRIMARY KEY, start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_composite (composite_id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2020-01-01', DATE '2020-01-07');
INSERT INTO test_composite (composite_id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (2, DATE '2020-12-28', DATE '2021-01-03');
SELECT c.composite_id, usweekofyear(c.start_date) AS start_week, usweekofyear(c.end_date) AS end_week FROM test_composite c WHERE start_date <> end_date;
SELECT d.id, usweekofyear(d.event_date) - usweekofyear(NOW()) AS week_difference FROM test_dates d WHERE d.event_date IS NOT NULL AND d.inet_value <> inet '192.168.1.2' ORDER BY week_difference;
